001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
031
032/**
033 * Parses a MessagePack stream into a POJO model.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
036 *
037 * Handles <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>application/msgpack, octal/msgpack</bc>
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * The legacy media type <bc>octal/msgpack</bc> is retained as a backward-compatibility alias so
041 * that existing wire values still decode. New consumers should prefer the RFC-standard
042 * <bc>application/msgpack</bc> value.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
045 * <p>
046 * MessagePack-to-Java type mapping:
047 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
048 *    <li>MessagePack map → bean or {@link Map}
049 *    <li>MessagePack array → {@link Collection} or Java array
050 *    <li>MessagePack string → {@link String}; coerced to types parseable from string
051 *    <li>MessagePack boolean → {@link Boolean}
052 *    <li>MessagePack int → {@link Integer}; coerced to {@link Long}, {@link Short}, {@link Byte} as needed
053 *    <li>MessagePack float → {@link Float} or {@link Double}
054 *    <li>MessagePack binary → {@code byte[]}
055 *    <li>MessagePack nil → {@code null}
056 * </ul>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
060 * </ul>
061 *
062 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
063 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/MessagePackSupport">MessagePack Basics</a>
064
065 * </ul>
066 */
067@SuppressWarnings({
068   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
069   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
070   "resource"   // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
071})
072public class MsgPackParser extends InputStreamParser implements MsgPackMetaProvider, TokenReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
073
074   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
075   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
076
077   // Property name constants
078   private static final String PROP_nativeMode = "nativeMode";
079
080   /** Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64. */
081   public static class Base64 extends MsgPackParser {
082
083      /**
084       * Constructor.
085       *
086       * @param builder The builder for this object.
087       */
088      public Base64(Builder builder) {
089         super(builder.binaryFormat(BinaryFormat.BASE64));
090      }
091   }
092
093   /**
094    * Builder class.
095    */
096   public static class Builder extends InputStreamParser.Builder<Builder> {
097
098      private static final Cache<HashKey,MsgPackParser> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, MsgPackParser.class).build();
099
100      private boolean nativeMode;
101
102      /**
103       * Constructor, default settings.
104       */
105      protected Builder() {
106         consumes("application/msgpack,octal/msgpack");
107         nativeMode = env("MsgPackParser.nativeMode", false);
108      }
109
110      /**
111       * Copy constructor.
112       *
113       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
114       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
115       */
116      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
117         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
118         nativeMode = copyFrom.nativeMode;
119      }
120
121      /**
122       * Copy constructor.
123       *
124       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
125       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
126       */
127      protected Builder(MsgPackParser copyFrom) {
128         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
129         nativeMode = copyFrom.nativeMode;
130      }
131
132      /**
133       * Surfaces the MsgPack {@code ext} type byte as token-level metadata on
134       * {@link TokenReader} cursors returned by {@link MsgPackParserSession#parseTokens(Object)}.
135       *
136       * <p>
137       * When enabled, ext tokens carry the signed type byte (visible via
138       * {@link TokenReader#getExtType()}) on {@link TokenType#VALUE_BINARY} tokens.  When
139       * disabled (default), the payload still surfaces as {@link TokenType#VALUE_BINARY} but
140       * the type byte is dropped.
141       *
142       * <p>
143       * This is a token-cursor-level setting and does not affect the high-level POJO databind
144       * path ({@link MsgPackParser#parse(Object, Class)}); that path always discards the type
145       * byte.
146       *
147       * @return This object.
148       */
149      public Builder nativeMode() {
150         return nativeMode(true);
151      }
152
153      /**
154       * Same as {@link #nativeMode()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
155       *
156       * @param value The value for this setting.
157       * @return This object.
158       */
159      public Builder nativeMode(boolean value) {
160         nativeMode = value;
161         return this;
162      }
163
164      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
165      public MsgPackParser build() {
166         return cache(CACHE).build(MsgPackParser.class);
167      }
168
169      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
170      public Builder copy() {
171         return new Builder(this);
172      }
173
174      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
175      public HashKey hashKey() {
176         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), nativeMode);
177      }
178   }
179
180   /** Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex. */
181   public static class SpacedHex extends MsgPackParser {
182
183      /**
184       * Constructor.
185       *
186       * @param builder The builder for this object.
187       */
188      public SpacedHex(Builder builder) {
189         super(builder.binaryFormat(BinaryFormat.SPACED_HEX));
190      }
191   }
192
193   /** Default parser, all default settings.*/
194   public static final MsgPackParser DEFAULT = new MsgPackParser(create());
195   /** Default parser with binary-native opt-in mode enabled (MsgPack {@code ext} type byte surfaces as token-level metadata). */
196   public static final MsgPackParser DEFAULT_NATIVE = new MsgPackParser(create().nativeMode());
197   /** Default parser, all default settings, string input encoded as spaced-hex.*/
198   public static final MsgPackParser DEFAULT_SPACED_HEX = new SpacedHex(create());
199
200   /** Default parser, all default settings, string input encoded as BASE64.*/
201   public static final MsgPackParser DEFAULT_BASE64 = new Base64(create());
202
203   /**
204    * Creates a new builder for this object.
205    *
206    * @return A new builder.
207    */
208   public static Builder create() {
209      return new Builder();
210   }
211
212   protected final boolean nativeMode;
213
214   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,MsgPackClassMeta> msgPackClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
215   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta> msgPackBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
216
217   /**
218    * Constructor.
219    *
220    * @param builder The builder for this object.
221    */
222   public MsgPackParser(Builder builder) {
223      super(builder);
224      this.nativeMode = builder.nativeMode;
225   }
226
227   /**
228    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if token-cursor native mode is enabled.
229    *
230    * @return <jk>true</jk> if native mode is enabled, else <jk>false</jk>.
231    */
232   public boolean isNativeMode() {
233      return nativeMode;
234   }
235
236   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
237   public Builder copy() {
238      return new Builder(this);
239   }
240
241   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
242   public MsgPackParserSession.Builder createSession() {
243      return MsgPackParserSession.create(this);
244   }
245
246   @Override /* Overridden from MsgPackMetaProvider */
247   public MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta getMsgPackBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
248      if (bpm == null)
249         return MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
250      return msgPackBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
251   }
252
253   @Override /* Overridden from MsgPackMetaProvider */
254   public MsgPackClassMeta getMsgPackClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
255      return msgPackClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new MsgPackClassMeta(k, this));
256   }
257
258   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
259   public MsgPackParserSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
260
261   /**
262    * Convenience delegator that opens a {@link MsgPackTokenReader} over the input using
263    * <b>default session arguments</b> (mirrors {@link #parse(Object, Class)}).
264    *
265    * <p>
266    * The real implementation lives on {@link MsgPackParserSession#parseTokens(Object)}.  Callers
267    * that need request-derived configuration (locale, timezone, schema, swaps) should call
268    * {@link #createSession()} and invoke {@link MsgPackParserSession#parseTokens(Object)} on the
269    * built session instead.
270    *
271    * @param input The input.
272    * @return A new {@link MsgPackTokenReader}.
273    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
274    */
275   @Override /* TokenReadable */
276   public TokenReader parseTokens(Object input) throws IOException {
277      return getSession().parseTokens(input);
278   }
279
280   /**
281    * Convenience delegator for the array-element {@link RecordReader} (uses default session args;
282    * see {@link #parseTokens(Object)}).  Real impl on
283    * {@link MsgPackParserSession#parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
284    *
285    * @param input The input.
286    * @return A new array-element {@link RecordReader}.
287    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
288    */
289   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
290   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
291      return getSession().parseArrayRecords(input);
292   }
293
294   @Override /* Overridden from InputStreamParser */
295   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
296      return super.properties()
297         .a(PROP_nativeMode, nativeMode);
298   }
299}
